properties.entry: SELECT COUNT(Individual.id) FROM Individual JOIN Field ON Individual.id = Field.ownerid WHERE Field.name = 'email' AND Field.value IS NOT NULL AND :segmentId = ANY(Individual.segmentIds)
SELECT COUNT(Individual.id) FROM Individual JOIN Field ON Individual.id = Field.ownerid WHERE Field.name = 'email' AND Field.value IS NOT NULL AND Individual.id IN (:ids) GROUP BY Individual.id
DELETE FROM Individual WHERE Individual.id IN (:ids)
SELECT Individual.id FROM Individual WHERE :segmentId = ANY(Individual.segmentIds) ORDER BY Individual.id
UPDATE Individual SET segmentIds = array_remove(segmentIds, :segmentId) WHERE :segmentId = ANY(Individual.segmentIds)
UPDATE Individual SET segmentIds = array_remove(segmentIds, :segmentId) WHERE Individual.id IN (:ids)
UPDATE Individual SET segmentIds = array_subtract(segmentIds, ARRAY[ :segmentIds ]) WHERE ARRAY[ :segmentIds ] && Individual.segmentIds
